versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   vllm-stack-0-1-11               true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: vllm
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: vllm-stack-0-1-11
      name: vllm-stack
      namespace: vllm
      values: |
        servingEngineSpec:
          runtimeClassName: ""
          modelSpec:
          - name: "opt125m"
            repository: "vllm/vllm-openai"
            tag: "latest"
            modelURL: "facebook/opt-125m"
            replicaCount: 1
            requestCPU: 6
            requestMemory: "16Gi"
            requestGPU: 1
